title: Google's New AI Architecture Changes Everything (Gemma 4 12B)
summary: Google DeepMind released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal AI model that processes images and audio by directly ingesting raw pixels and waveforms instead of using separate encoder models. The architecture eliminates intermediate encoding steps to achieve faster offline inference on consumer hardware like Apple Silicon.
